name: Hand by Hand
subtitle: Humanity & Technology · A Virtual Exhibition
creator: Hand by Hand Exhibition
description: A cinematic virtual museum experience built for the Monad hackathon vision: art at the center, technology invisible. The Exhibition NFT represents ownership of this exhibition experience, architecture, and metadata — never the third-party artworks on the walls.

copyright.notice: Displayed works are shown with attribution for exhibition viewing only. They are not minted, sold, licensed, or otherwise tokenized by this platform. The Exhibition NFT covers creator-owned experience architecture and metadata only.
copyright.nftCovers: creator-owned architecture, logo, or hero imagery only
